queries.question: Provide the customer service advisors and IT support technicians who are bilingual.
queries.sql:
SELECT Employees.FullName
FROM Customer_Facing_Roles JOIN Employees ON Customer_Facing_Roles.id = Employees.customer_role_id JOIN Language_Proficiencies ON Employees.language_proficiency_id = Language_Proficiencies.id
WHERE (Customer_Facing_Roles.role = "Customer Service Advisor" OR Customer_Facing_Roles.role = "IT Support Technician") AND Language_Proficiencies.language = "Bilingual"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?customer_facing_roles a :Customer_Facing_Roles .
  ?employees a :Employees .
  ?employees p:hasCustomer_Facing_Roles ?customer_facing_roles .
  ?language_proficiencies a :Language_Proficiencies .
  ?employees p:hasLanguage_Proficiencies ?language_proficiencies .
  ?employees p:name ?fullname .
  ?customer_facing_roles p:role ?role_w .
  ?customer_facing_roles p:role ?role_w2 .
  ?language_proficiencies p:language ?language_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?role_w) = "Customer Service Advisor" || STR(?role_w2) = "IT Support Technician")) && STR(?language_w) = "Bilingual"))
}
